tasks.label: Sync: Start work (pull latest)
tasks.detail: Run this when you sit down at a PC: fetches the latest work from GitHub.

tasks.label: Sync: Save & push
tasks.command: git add -A; if (git diff --cached --quiet) { Write-Host 'Nothing to commit.' } else { git commit -m "${input:commitMessage}" }; git push
tasks.detail: Run this when you finish: commits everything and pushes to GitHub.
